subcodes.first_line: Convey the utmost affection on my behalf to the maid-servant of God, Miss Anna Kostlin and say to her: Thy services are always before my eyes
subcodes.first_line_orig: بامه الله مس انا کستلین از قبل من نهایت مهربانی بردن و بگو خدماتت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @monasticism; asceticism, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
